title: 菊花賞の後に・負けてもサイコー！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The front pack rounds the fourth corner! They're
entering the final straight! Which of them will
conquer the Kikuka Sho?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haaaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: (Hayahide... Her aura's incredible!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The battle between BNW comes to a head! And
the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Ugh, I couldn't win...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But still!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of breath, Winning Ticket looks up toward
the stands.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Tickezo! You were so close! But what a great race!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: BNW is the best... I can't keep my eyes off them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heheh... I was still able to run a great race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Yeah, I let first place slip through my
fingers...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But it was still a great race. I feel like I put up a
good fight!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
My fans were all really excited too, so it was
worth the effort!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! After all, winning makes me happier than
losing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I gotta say though, Taishin and Hayahide are
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All their power and spirit during the race made
my skin tingle!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that from here on, we'll have even more
awesome races!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, is my next race decided already? I
wanna run with them again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If the fan nominations go our way, the Arima
Kinen will be a strong contender, but it's too
early to say that for sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For now, a good target might be the Osaka Hai,
often said to be the race that decides the
greatest senior medium-distance runner of the
spring season.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a fair chance Narita Taishin and Biwa
Hayahide will enter as well.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The Osaka Hai? Sure, I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll go full speed at the Osaka Hai and
give my fans a great show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is pumped for her next goal, the
Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, two figures are quietly watching her.
